steps.title: Check current weaviate deployment
steps.description:
Verify your weaviate version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
helm list -n weaviate 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working weaviate installation.

steps.title: Review weaviate configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant weaviate configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
kubectl get configmap -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=weaviate
```
Would be nice to retrieve also the keyword highlighting in the field _additional.
As https://solr.apache.org/guide/solr/latest/query-guide/highlighting.html.

This is a very important feature for any WooCommerce application.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [new feature] Highlighting
Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
kubectl get events -n weaviate --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[new feature] Highlighting " is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Can you brief about the way we want to implement this OR provide a sample request with response.
codeSnippets:
### `entities/additional/classification.go`

Update the `Properties` struct to include the toggle:

---

## 2. GraphQL API Updates

### `adapters/handlers/graphql/local/get/class_builder.go`

* Add `highlight` field to additional fields.
* Implement the `additionalHighlightField()` method.

### `adapters/handlers/graphql/local/get/class_builder_fields.go`

* Add `highlight` to the `isAdditional()` check.
* Implement extraction logic for the following input parameters:

| Parameter | Type | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `highlight` | Boolean | Enables the highlighting feature | `false` |
| `highlightFragments` | Integer | Number of fragments to return | `1` |
| `highlightFragmentSeparator` | String | String used to join fragments | `...` |
| `highlightProperty` | String | Specific property to highlight | Optional |

---
